title: Diath family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Nico_Diath.png|thumb|right|200px|Nico Diath, famed nomad Jedi Master]]
{{Quote|The Diath clan…has produced a great number of Jedi Masters.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="Republic 53">[[Republic 53|''Republic'' 53]]</ref>}}
The '''Diath family''' was a famous [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] bloodline associated with the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. While the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was abandoned between the [[Old Sith Wars]] and [[100 BBY/Legends|100 BBY]], Tatooine was still the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to members of the Diath family in the [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
